creator: rnejdl@ringofsaturn.com
text:
Mark,

Just letting you know that I am looking at this.  I had been looking to 
update to ASSP_1.8.5.9-Install.zip but the version you have here is 
newer.  One thing I have run into a number of times is that the 
maintainers re-roll the software and don't change the version, so I 
usually let things sit for a bit after a release.  Anyways, I am getting 
my virtualbox up and current again to test this there and see how it 
does.  Then I will mirror this .zip file over to my server in case they 
change it upstream as they commonly do.

Rusty
